evidence_sentence: mini3 lac2 partially rescued larger than mini3 alone

LAC2 is a peripheral seed-coat laccase that was not curated into the network (literature_gap from JUDGE iter 1). With only the MINI3 KO portion modelable, the test reduces to "mini3 KO vs mini3 KO" = ratio 1.0 unchanged, which cannot match the expected rescue direction. Re-encoded as not_in_network per REFINEMENT §1.5 Step D.
